properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Everything inside me cries for order Everything inside me wants to hide Is this shadow, an angel or a warrior? If God is pleased with me, why am I so terrified?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Someone tell me I am only dreaming Somehow help me see with Heaven's eyes And before my head agrees, my heart is on it's knees Holy is He, blessed am I

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Be born in me, be born in me Trembling heart, somehow I believe That You chose me I'll hold you in the beginning You will hold me in the end Every moment in the middle Make my heart your Bethlehem Be born in me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: All this time we've waited for the promise All this time You've waited for my arms Did You wrap yourself inside the unexpected So we might know that love would go that far?

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I am not brave I'll never be The only thing my heart can offer is a vacancy I'm just a girl Nothing more I am willing, I am Yours

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Be born in me, be born in me I'll hold you in the beginning You will hold me in the end Every moment in the middle Make my heart your Bethlehem Be born in me
